title: Delitto a Posillipo - Londra chiama Napoli
actors: Pupetta Maresca, Giancarlo Del Duca, Ingrid Schoeller
plot: A man accepts a job in a night club to make ends meet. When the owner of the club is found murdered his jealous wife is accused of the murder. He believes her innocent however and fights to clear her name. The film is based on a r...
